title: Imperial Bodyguard
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Imperial|more=Bodyguard}}
[[File:Platt_guards.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Two Imperial Bodyguards, with Rebel prisoner [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]].]]
'''Imperial Bodyguards''' were elite enforcers assigned to protect [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisors]]. They wore distinctive body armor, and were skilled wielders of the [[Force pike/Legends|force pike]], although they also carried heavy [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]].

[[Bregius Golthan]] had a personal escort of four of these troopers. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], they accompanied him on a mission to the planet [[Canyon]] where he seized smuggler and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] scout [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]].

They subsequently served as Okeefe's guards when she was held prisoner in the audience chamber of his stronghold on [[Voktunma]]. They had orders to guard her with their lives, but the [[Black Curs]] rescued her nonetheless.

==Behind the scenes==
It is not clear whether the Imperial Bodyguards were unique personal escorts for Advisor Golthan, or if they were assigned to all the Advisors; nor is it certain if they were formed as a unit before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], or if they were created at the time of the Cabal.
